title: FAQ
q1: Do you deliver to all UAE regions?
a1: Yes, we deliver to all Emirates across the UAE, covering every city and area, with the option to schedule delivery at your convenience.
q2: What makes Heeb Al Fakher products special?
a2: We focus on providing high-quality natural products with authentic taste, preserving Emirati heritage and offering a unique experience for our customers.
q3: What if I receive a damaged item?
a3: Please contact us within 24 hours with a photo of the product, and we will replace it or refund you immediately.
a4: Delivery fees vary depending on your location and may be free when reaching a certain order amount.
supportDesc: Our support team is available 24/7 to assist you.
